title: Can Capital One (COF) Climb 26% to Reach the Level Wall Street Analysts Expect?
text: The average of price targets set by Wall Street analysts indicates a potential upside of 25.7% in Capital One (COF). While the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric is questionable, the positive trend in earnings estimate revisions might translate into an upside in the stock.

title: Wall Street Analysts See a 29% Upside in Capital One (COF): Can the Stock Really Move This High?
text: The mean of analysts' price targets for Capital One (COF) points to a 29% upside in the stock. While this highly sought-after metric has not proven reasonably effective, strong agreement among analysts in raising earnings estimates does indicate an upside in the stock.
